title: KitchenPerfected 200w Hand Blender - 2 Speed Settings - Stainless Steel Chopping Blades - Mains Cord - White - E5021WH
features: VERSATILE: This hand blender is not only ideal for blending food items but can also be used to chop food items. Whether you need to puree soup or whip a quick salad dressing, a hand blender is a right appliance for you.
STAINLESS STEEL CHOPPING BLADES: The blades are attached to a spindle that connects to the motor unit, allowing the blades to chop in a circular motion at high speeds.
MOTOR UNIT: The motor unit drives the blades, causing them to oscillate rapidly. Push down on the motor unit to operate.
2 SPEED BUTTONS: Pressing 1 will operate the motor continuously at a low/medium rate. Pressing 2 will operate the motor continuously at the maximum rate for a finer blend.
MAINS CORD: Simply connect the unit to a suitable 220-240v-50Hz mains power supply.
description: Product Description The KitchenPerfected 200w Hand Blender is a small and portable design, as most kitchens are restricted in space, this is the perfect way to make your cooking easy and simple. The hand blender is also easy to store as it doesn't take up a lot of space. Stainless steel blades chop and blend at high speeds, providing you with a fast way of preparing your ingredients. You are able to choose the power with 2 speed settings, one low/medium rate and one at maximum for a finer blend, you can use these options to use the blender in a way that fits your cooking needs. Box Includes: KitchenPerfected 200w Hand Blender Instruction Manual. Box Contains 1 x Lloytron E5021WH 200W Hand Blender - White
